name: refreshable-list
description: FlatList wrapper with a themed RefreshControl for pull-to-refresh.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of data items to render in the list.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Function that renders each list item.

props.name: keyExtractor
props.description: Function that returns a unique key for each item.

props.name: refreshing
props.description: Whether the refresh indicator is currently showing.

props.name: onRefresh
props.description: Callback fired when the user pulls down to refresh.

props.name: showSeparator
props.description: Renders a hairline divider between items using theme.colors.borderSecondary.

props.name: contentPadding
props.description: Uniform padding applied to all sides of the content container using a spacing token.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the outermost FlatList.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<RefreshableList
  data={items}
  keyExtractor={(item) => item.id}
  renderItem={({ item }) => <ItemRow item={item} />}
  refreshing={isRefreshing}
  onRefresh={handleRefresh}
  showSeparator
  contentPadding="md"
/>
